spec.description: AzureASOManagedControlPlaneTemplateSpec defines the desired state of AzureASOManagedControlPlane.
AzureASOManagedControlPlaneTemplateResourceSpec defines the desired state of the templated resource.

resources.description: Resources are embedded ASO resources to be managed by this resource.

version.description:
Version is the Kubernetes version of the control plane. It fulfills Cluster API's control plane
provider contract.

exampleYAML:
apiVersion: infrastructure.cluster.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1
kind: AzureASOManagedControlPlaneTemplate
metadata:
  name: example-azureasomanagedcontrolplanetemplate
  namespace: default
spec:
  template: {}
